name: IMAP Email
description: Standard IMAP email access — iCloud, Yahoo, Fastmail, ProtonMail Bridge, university servers, self-hosted
agentDocs:
## IMAP Email

IMAP email accounts are registered but not yet operational. An IMAP MCP server or CLI tool needs to be added to the container. The `gws` (Gmail) and `ms365` (Outlook) providers are ready to use now.

Registered IMAP accounts and their connection details are in `/workspace/.imap-tokens/`.

auth.loginCommand: echo 'IMAP uses app passwords — no OAuth flow needed. Run /add-email-account to register an IMAP account.'
auth.description: IMAP accounts use app passwords configured via /add-email-account
